Breakfast brings joy to many families. Morning meals can feature tasty pancakes, crispy bacon, golden toast, fresh fruit, warm waffles, hot cereal, buttery croissants, sweet jam, creamy butter, crunchy granola, fluffy biscuits, sizzling sausage, fried potatoes, maple syrup, blueberry muffins, steaming coffee, cold milk, hot chocolate, sliced bananas, ripe strawberries, thick yogurt, nutritious smoothies, hearty porridge, delicious hash browns, warm cinnamon rolls, freshly baked bread, savory ham, melted cheese, grilled tomatoes, sautéed mushrooms.
